---
title: "Anne F. Bromhead"
---

## Anne F. Bromhead

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1867)

### Biography

She was probably Mrs A. F. Bromhead,  the founder and first Lady Superintendent of the Lincoln institution known as the Bromhead Nursing Home, and then the Bromhead Hospital until 2001, when the NHS sold it to Nuffield Hospitals. 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
